film.title: Half Girlfriend
film.overview: A boy meets a girl named Riya and falls in love. After struggling to convince her to be his girlfriend, she half-heartedly agrees to be his `half-girlfriend'.

dialogues.dialogue: It's all right when you want to hug me. It's all right when you want to kiss me. But you label me as shameless when I want to do the same. -After all, I'm a human being, Riya. -Madhav! Sometimes you want this, sometimes you want that!
and not to mention you'll get a good thrashing. Stop blushing and stop staring at me. -Go and make us proud! -Silly boy. I'm Madhav Jha. Madhav.
He gifted her a solitaire. But I'm a prince from Bihar. For the first time, I was proud of being the Prince of Simrao. Where did you spend your night? Where did you spend your night?
But you're leaving. Madhav...That girl...Anshika, where did you record that video? 33rd and 2nd... Cafe Wha. Go and make us proud. Go! Taxi! Is there an Indian singer?
